nasb.text: Then the king of Israel said, “Alas! For the Lord has called these three kings to give them into the hand of Moab.”

esv.text: Then the king of Israel said, “Alas! The Lord has called these three kings to give them into the hand of Moab.”

cnv.text: 以色列王說：“哎喲，耶和華招聚這三位君王，是要把他們交在摩押人的手中。”

ccb.text: 以色列王叫道：“唉！怎么办呢？耶和华招聚我们三王，是要把我们交给摩押王！”
